license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rwbd7an
title: G6PD Activity
author: Wen Aw

steps_raw.instruction: Homogenize 2 larvae in 40uL of lysis buffer (20mM Tris-HCL, pH8.0, 3mM magenesium chloride, 1mM EDTA, 0.02% B-mercaptoethanol, Protease inhibitor and 0.1% Triton X100)
Centrifuge at 16,000g for 15min at 4 degree celcius and collected the supernatant
Protein concentration is determined by Bradford Assay
Prepare NADPH standard ranges from 0-0.3mM in buffer
Buffer containing 5mM of both G6P+ 6PGL, 2mM NADP+
Added NADP+ into all well (2.5uL of 80mM +37.5uL of Tris Buffer)
Added 10uL of sample to make up a final volume of 50uL
Initiate reaction by adding 50uL of substrate (G6P+6PGL (both 5mM final concentration ) or 6PGL (5mM final concentration)
